releaseNotes:
VoiceLink Native v1.0.0 - Official Release

New Features:
- Native macOS app built with Swift and SwiftUI
- Permanent rooms with device rotation
- Guest rooms (10-30 min, 15 users max)
- OpenLink visitor room support
- Mastodon/Email authentication
- Trust score system
- eCrypto wallet integration
- Escort Me safety feature
- Auto-updater
- Membership levels (Newbie, Regular, Outstanding)
- Server room capacity (50-5000)
- Recording Manager with multi-track support
- VST Streaming Engine for audio effects
- Jellyfin media server integration
- Text-to-Speech announcements
- Full accessibility/VoiceOver support
- Spatial audio engine
- Multi-channel audio support

Requirements:
- macOS 13.0 or later
- Internet connection for voice chat
